title: BASIS Conformance Attestation v1
description: Signed scorecard a BASIS-compliant product publishes per release. See rfcs/0003-conformance-attestation.md.

attestationVersion.description: Version of this attestation format spec. Currently 1.

version.description: Semver version string for the product release being attested.

releasedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the product release.

conformanceSuite.description: The conformance suite this product was tested against.

name.description: Package or repo name of the suite (e.g. '@vorionsys/basis-conformance').

revision.description: Exact git sha (or other immutable revision id) of the suite source. Lets verifiers reproduce results byte-for-byte.

source.description: Optional URL where the suite source can be fetched.

results.description: Aggregate test results plus optional per-test details.

details.description: Per-test outcomes. Required when failed > 0; recommended always.

id.description: Stable test identifier from the suite. Format defined by the suite (e.g. 'tier-transition.t0-t1').

reason.description: Required when status is 'skipped' or 'failed'. Human-readable explanation.

specRef.description: Optional citation to the RFC section the test exercises (e.g. 'RFC-0002§hash-semantics').

signature.description: Detached Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON of every other field. Base64url-encoded, no padding.

signedBy.description: Signer identifier — DID, key fingerprint, or other resolvable id. Verifiers fetch the public key by this id out-of-band.

revoked.description: True iff this attestation has been revoked. When true, revokedAt and revokedReason are required.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 of revocation. Required when revoked is true.

revokedReason.description: Human-readable reason for revocation. Required when revoked is true.

supersededBy.description: Optional version string of the release that supersedes this one (in case of revocation).

thirdParty.description: True iff this attestation was produced by a party other than the product vendor (e.g. an external auditor).

vendorAttestation.description: When thirdParty is true, the URL of the original vendor attestation this third-party attestation cross-checks.
